nodes.title: List Currencies
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/currencies with Authorization header. Returns array of currencies with {id, name, code, symbol, isDefault}.

nodes.title: Create Currency
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/currencies with {name, code, symbol, isDefault?}. Creates currency record. Returns created currency. Returns 400 if code already exists.

nodes.title: List Exchange Rates
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/exchange-rates with Authorization header. Returns array of exchange rates with {id, fromCurrencyId, toCurrencyId, rate, date}.

nodes.title: Create Exchange Rate
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/exchange-rates with {fromCurrencyId, toCurrencyId, rate, date}. Creates exchange rate record. Returns created rate.

nodes.title: Update Exchange Rate
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/exchange-rates/:id with {rate?, date?}. Updates exchange rate. Returns updated rate.

nodes.title: Delete Exchange Rate
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/exchange-rates/:id. Removes exchange rate. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Convert Currency
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/exchange-rates/convert?from=1&to=2&amount=100 with Authorization header. Converts amount using latest exchange rate. Returns {fromAmount, toAmount, rate, fromCurrency, toCurrency}. Returns 404 if no rate found.
